UpdateVpnTunnel.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string up to 64 characters long. See [ClientToken Idempotency](https://cloud.baidu.com/doc/VPC/s/gjwvyu77i/).
UpdateVpnTunnel.vpnConnId: The ID of the VPN tunnel connection
UpdateVpnTunnel.vpnId: The ID of the VPN gateway that the tunnel belongs to
UpdateVpnTunnel.secretKey: Shared secret key, 8–17 characters, must contain a combination of letters, digits, and symbols; allowed symbols: !@#$%^*()_
UpdateVpnTunnel.localSubnets: List of local network CIDR blocks
UpdateVpnTunnel.remoteSubnets: List of remote network CIDR blocks
UpdateVpnTunnel.vpnConnName: VPN tunnel name; supports uppercase/lowercase letters, digits, and special characters -_/.; must start with a letter; length 1–65
UpdateVpnTunnel.ikeConfig.ikeLifeTime: SA lifetime in seconds; valid range: 60–86400
UpdateVpnTunnel.ipsecConfig.ipsecLifetime: SA lifetime in seconds; valid range: 180–86400
